{{Expand}}

{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Mercy's Goldsign
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy's Goldsign]] is a black madra that she wears like gloves.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
